title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of preparing society for increasing automation and AI, then decide which two are most important.
options: Investing in retraining and reskilling programmes for workers
Introducing a universal basic income to support displaced workers
Reforming education to focus on creativity and human-centred skills
Regulating the pace of automation in vulnerable industries
Encouraging businesses to share the productivity gains from AI with workers

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to automation and the future of jobs. Discuss the following ways of preparing society for increasing automation and AI, then decide which two are most important. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most important..
